name: Dots and Boxes
author: Ryan Briggs
description: A tiny graph-theory duel in a box-shaped universe.

achievements.name: Box Magnate
achievements.description: Claim 1000 boxes in total

achievements.name: Centurion
achievements.description: Play 100 games

achievements.name: Marathon
achievements.description: Play for over 1 hour

achievements.name: Easy Does It
achievements.description: Win a game on Easy

achievements.name: Stepping Up
achievements.description: Win a game on Medium

achievements.name: Hard Earned
achievements.description: Win a game on Hard

achievements.name: Expert Slayer
achievements.description: Win a game on Expert

achievements.name: Landslide
achievements.description: Win by 8 or more boxes vs Hard or Expert

achievements.name: Underdog
achievements.description: Go second and beat Hard or Expert

achievements.name: Speed Run
achievements.description: Win a 5x5 or larger board in under a minute

achievements.name: War of Attrition
achievements.description: Win a game lasting over 5 minutes

achievements.name: Perfect Loop
achievements.description: Claim a chain of 8 or more boxes in one turn

achievements.name: Shutout
achievements.description: Win without conceding a single box

achievements.name: Big Sweep
achievements.description: Claim 20 or more boxes in a single game

achievements.name: Double Up
achievements.description: Win with at least double the AI's score

achievements.name: The Long Game
achievements.description: Claim a chain of 12 or more boxes in one turn

achievements.name: From the Brink
achievements.description: Win by exactly 1 box vs Hard or Expert

achievements.name: Giant Slayer
achievements.description: Beat Expert on an 8x8 board

achievements.name: Big Board
achievements.description: Win a game on an 8x8 board

achievements.name: Vengeance
achievements.description: Beat Expert after losing to it by 10 or more

achievements.name: Draw Artist
achievements.description: Finish a game in an exact tie

achievements.name: Boxed In
achievements.description: Lose without claiming a single box

achievements.name: Four Corners
achievements.description: Win owning all four corner boxes (Medium+)

achievements.name: Full Stripe
achievements.description: Win owning a full row or column (Medium+)

achievements.name: Iron Will
achievements.description: Win 3 Expert games in a row

achievements.name: On Fire
achievements.description: Win 5 Expert games in a row

achievements.name: Untouchable
achievements.description: Win 10 games in a row on any difficulty

achievements.name: Survey Course
achievements.description: Win on every board size

achievements.name: Tier Climber
achievements.description: Win on every difficulty

achievements.name: Spectrum
achievements.description: Win on every board size and every difficulty
